title: Emily Blunt Is ‘Terrified of AI’ and Refused to Use It on Steven Spielberg’s ‘Disclosure Day'
description: Emily Blunt rejected using artificial intelligence (AI) when filming a pivotal scene in Steven Spielberg's forthcoming sci-fi film Disclosure Day, revealing she is terrified of the creative medium.
content:

title: Editorial: Preserving humanity amid AI revolution
description: Artificial intelligence seems to have found its way into almost everything. Schools are trying to balance using it in some areas while weeding it out in others. Some universities are returning to handwritten blue book exams to ensure original thought. Others are using artificial intelligence to screen assignments for signs
content:
Artificial intelligence seems to have found its way into almost everything.

title: At the epicenter of AI, Pope Leo’s warnings are dismissed
description: SAN FRANCISCO – When Pope Leo XIV presented a 42,300-word open letter to the world’s 1.4 billion Catholics on Monday, calling for protections against the rise of artificial intelligence, he was joined by Christopher Olah, a co-founder of Anthropic, which is one of the tech industry’s leading AI companies.

title: In era of AI, deepfake, credibility crisis looms largest: Scindia on challenges for journalism
description: Union minister Jyotiraditya Scindia on Saturday said press faced censorship and scarce resources during the colonial era, but challenges for journalism are different in today's era of artificial intelligence and deepfake technology, while the biggest crisis is that of credibility.

title: After OpenAI, SoftBank plans investment in French AI centers
description: Tech News News: Japanese tech giant SoftBank Group has announced a massive plan to invest up to €75 billion (approx $87 billion) to build artificial intelligence (AI).

description: Bishop Paul Tighe became a link between Silicon Valley and the Vatican dialogue going back a decade

title: India poised to benefit as global wealth turns to AI, infra, emerging markets: Report
description: Global family offices are increasingly directing capital toward artificial intelligence, infrastructure, energy transition and emerging markets as they reposition portfolios for a more uncertain world. A new UBS report suggests these trends could create significant opportunities for India across technology, infrastructure, private markets and gold investments.
content: India could emerge as one of the key beneficiaries of shifting global investment trends as wealthy families and family offices increasingly allocate capital toward artificial intelligence (AI), infrastructure, emerging markets and gold, according to ... [4477 chars]

title: SoftBank to spend €75b on Europe’s biggest AI facility in France
description: SoftBank is putting all of its efforts into establishing itself at the heart of the artificial intelligence revolution.
content: SoftBank has pledged to invest up to €75 billion ($121.6 billion) in a vast network of AI computing clusters in France, backing what would be Europe’s biggest data centre project as the region races to catch up with the US and China in AI infrastruct... [271 chars]

title: Putin losing 1,000 troops a day as Ukraine unleashes deadly AI drone attacks
description: Ukraine is increasingly relying on artificial intelligence-powered drones to strike Russian military targets far behind the front lines. Recent attacks have targeted supply vehicles and logistics routes linking Russia with southern Ukraine

title: NBA will put AI in charge to tackle bad ref calls and fan fury
description: Bad referee calls have become one of the NBA’s most frustrating recurring storylines, especially during the playoffs when every possession gets dissected online within seconds. Now, the league appears ready to lean much harder into artificial intelligence in an attempt to reduce controversial officiating decisions and calm growing fan anger around inconsistent calls.
